description_long: This is a Perwoll Renew Advanced shampoo bottle designed for dark fabrics, featuring a sleek, curvy form with a wide base that tapers toward the neck. The bottle is predominantly black with a glossy finish, and it has a gray screw cap at the top. The front label displays the Perwoll logo in large white letters, with additional gold and purple accents and a visual motif of swirling dark fibers, suggesting its specialized use. The back and sides of the bottle are unadorned, emphasizing the ergonomic grip areas molded into the plastic. The overall design is modern and functional, with a sturdy plastic construction that is slightly translucent in some areas. The bottle appears to hold approximately 1.5 liters, as indicated on the label.
description: A sleek, black Perwoll Renew Advanced shampoo bottle with a gray screw cap, ergonomic curves, and a detailed front label featuring white, gold, and purple graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Perwoll logo, product details, and decorative graphics on the label.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's ergonomic grip and the smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, curved back of the bottle with no visible label or graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bottle's smooth contour and grip area, similar to the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: Perwoll logo in large white script on the front label.
attribute_label_text: Perwoll renew Advanced SCHWARZFASER FÜR ALLE dunklen Farben 1,5L
attribute_bottle_silhouette: curvy with a wide base, gently narrowing at the waist and tapering to a short neck
attribute_packaging_graphics: Swirling dark fiber motif and purple color accents on the front label.
